label: Active Mod IDs
description: Specifies the order and which mods are loaded. ModIDs need to be comma seperated and in one line.

label: Admin List URL
description: The url to a hosted text file containing one EOS ID per line of players that should be automatically granted admin. Must be enclosed in double quotes.

label: Admin Password
description: If specified, players must provide this password (via the in-game console) to gain access to administrator commands on the server.

label: Allow Bunker Modules Above Ground
description: Allow bunker modules above ground.

label: Allow Bunker Modules In "No Build" Zones
description: Allow bunker modules in areas that normally prevent building.

label: Allow Bunkers In "No Build" Zones
description: Allow bunkers in areas that normally prevent building.

label: Allow Cryofridge On Saddles
description: Will allow Cryofridges to be placed on rafts and platform saddles.

label: Allow Dinos In Bunkers
description: Allow dinos in bunkers.

label: Allow Riding In Bunkers
description: Allow riding dinos in bunkers.

label: Allow Speed Leveling
description: Allows points to be spent on leveling for both players and tames.

label: Allow Supply Crates on Structures
description: Supply crates will descend until they rest on top of structures instead of not spawning.

label: Allow Tesla Coils in Caves
description: Allows building tesla coils in caves.

label: Alpha Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from alpha kills.

label: Always Allow Structure Pickup
description: Structures can always be picked up regardless of how long ago they were placed.

label: Any Player May Imprint
description: If enabled, any player may perform imprint actions. If disabled, only the player who originally imprinted the creature may perform the imprint actions.

label: Armadoggo Respawn Cooldown
description: Number of seconds between Armadoggo respawns. Must be greater than zero.

label: Auto Create Tribes
description: Automatically force players into tribes.

label: Auto Destroy Old Structures
description: Enables the destructions of old structures. The interval is set using AutoDestroyOldStructuresMultiplier.

label: Auto Destroy Old Structures Period Multiplier
description: After the "allow claim" period times this multiplier, structures will be destroyed if no tribe has been nearby.

label: Automatically Destroy Decayed Creatures
description: Set to true to auto-destroy claimable creatures after their decay period.

label: Auto PvE Start Time in Seconds
description: Number of seconds from midnight to switch from PvP to PvE, up to 86400 seconds.

label: Auto PvE Stop Time in Seconds
description: Number of seconds from midnight to switch from PvE to PvP, up to 86400 seconds.

label: Auto Save Period
description: Number of minutes between automatic map save.

label: Bad Word List URL
description: URL to a text file containing bad words, one word per line.

label: Ban List URL
description: Use the official global ban list, or point to any online ban list that you want. Must be enclosed in double quotes.

label: Battery Consumption Multiplier
description: Values greater than 3.0 will consume charge batteries faster.

label: Boss Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from boss kills.

label: Cave Building in PvE
description: Allow players to build in caves when PvE mode is also enabled.

label: Cave Building in PvP
description: Allow players to build in caves when PvP mode is also enabled.

label: Cave Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from killing cave-spaned wild creatures.

label: Cave Structure Damage Multiplier
description: Values greater than 6.0 increase the amount of damage received by structures inside caves. A value of 1.0 would match damage to structures outside of caves.

label: Clamp Harvesting Damage
description: Limit the damage caused by a dino to a resource for harvesting.

label: Clamp Item Spoiling Times
description: Will clamp all spoiling times to the item's maximum value.

label: Convert To Unified Save Data
description: When turned on, player and tribe files will be copied into the map save data. The files will not be deleted automatically.

label: Corpse Life Span Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of time before a corpse is removed if not harvested.

label: Crafting Skill Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the bonus received from crafting skill

label: Crafting XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase experience gained from crafting.

label: Creature Count Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the total number of creatures spawned at each point.

label: Creature Damage Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase damage dealt by creatures.

label: Creature Food Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate creatures lose food.

label: Creature Health Recovery Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate creatures heal.

label: Creature Resistance Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase damage taken by creatures. At 0.0, creatures are invincible.

label: Creature Stamina Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate creatures lose stamina.

label: Crop Growth Speed Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase crop growth speed.

label: Crosshairs
description: Allows players to enable crosshairs.

label: Cryopod Debuff
description: Causes creatures to have altered stats for a set amount of time when waking from a cryopod.

label: Cryopod Debuff Damage Multiplier
description: Values greater than 0.01 will increase the amount of damage creatures can deal after being released from a cryopod if cryopod debuff is enabled.

label: Cryopod Debuff Duration
description: Number of minutes creatures will be affected by the cryopod debuff, if enabled.

label: Cryopod Debuff Resistance Multiplier
description: Increases incoming damage while affected by the cryopod debuff. A value of 0.25 results in a 1.25x incoming damage multiplier.

label: Cryosickness in PvE
description: Tamed creatures will experience cryosickness when released from cryopods in PvE mode. Cryosickness cannot be disabled in PvP mode.

label: Culture
description: Override server language.

label: Custom Dynamic Config URL
description: The URL to a file containing values that can be changed without restarting the server.

label: Custom Live Tuning URL
description: The URL of a live tuning file for changing other values not supported by CustomDynamicConfigURL.

label: Custom Recipe Effectiveness Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the effectiveness of custom recipes.

label: Custom Recipes
description: Allows players to create custom recipes.

label: Custom Recipe Skill Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the effect of crafting skill on custom recipe effectiveness.

label: Day Cycle Speed Scale
description: Adjust the total length of a 24 hour cycle. Leave this at 1.0 and adjust NightTimeSpeedScale and DayTimeSpeedScale instead.

label: Day Time Speed Scale
description: Adjust the amount of day. Values above 1.0 increase the length of day.

label: Destroy Tames Over Level Limit
description: Destroys tamed creatures over the specified level. Value of 0 disables the effect.

label: Difficulty
description: Sets the difficulty of the server. When set, both the map's hard-coded difficulty value and DifficultyOffset setting are ignored.

label: Difficulty Offset
description: Specifies the difficulty level as a percentage of the map's hard-coded difficulty. Maximum value is 1.0. Ignored if OverrideOfficialDifficulty is used.

label: Dino Decay Multiplier in PvE
description: Adjusts the rate at which the creature auto decay timer counts down.

label: Disable Creature Decay in PvE
description: Disable the gradual (7 days) decay of dinosaur ownership. Without this set to true, every dinosaur can be claimed by any player.

label: Disable Cryopod Enemy Check
description: Will ignore the enemy player, structure, and dino checks.

label: Disable Cryopod Fridge Requirement
description: Will disable the Cryofridge requirement when releasing dinos.

label: Disable Custom Cosmetics
description: When turned on, custom cosmetics are not allowed on the server.

label: Disable Gamma Changes in PvE
description: Prevents use of console command "gamma" in PvE mode

label: Disable Imprint Buff
description: Disables stat improvements to imprinted creatures.

label: Disable Megalab Babyfy
description: Disables the "babyfy" feature of the Makeshift Megalab.

label: Disable Photo Mode
description: Prevents players from accessing photo mode.

label: Disable Structure Decay in PvE
description: Disable the gradual (7 days) decay of player structures

label: Disable Weapon Restrictions While Riding
description: Disables the inability to equip weapons while riding creatures under certain conditions, such as Ryhnio without being attached to a wall.

label: Disconnect Delay
description: Number of seconds to wait after all tribe members leave the server to enable raid protection.

label: Enable Creative Mode
description: Shows a creative mode toggle button to admins.

label: Enable New Year's
description: Allow New Year's event to run at the specified times.

label: Enable Structure Stasis Grid
description: Enables the structure stasis grid to improve server performance on large bases.

label: Enable Tame Soft Limit
description: Enforce a soft tame limit. Tames over this limit will have a grace period before being destroyed.

label: Enforce Item Stat Limits
description: Normally item stats are theoretically unlimited. By adding this option, specific item stats may never reach over a defined threshold.

label: Explorer Note XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from finding explorer notes.

label: Extinction Interval
description: Number of seconds until the meteor hits and wipes the map. Set to 0 to disable extinction mode.

label: Fast Decay Unsnapped Core Structures
description: Will decay unsnapped foundations and pillars at five times the normal speed.

label: Filter Chat
description: Filter out chat based on the chosen word lists.

label: Filter Player Names
description: Filter out player names based on the chosen word lists.

label: Filter Tribe Names
description: Filter out tribe names based on the chosen word lists.

label: Fishing Loot Quality Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 improve the quality of loot obtained from fishing.

label: Fjordhawk Retrieval Cooldown
description: Number of seconds Fjordhawk must wait before retrieving another loot bag.

label: Flyers Can Carry Players in PvE
description: Flying creatures can pick up and carry players when the server is in PvE mode.

label: Flyers Cannot Fly with Attached C4
description: Most flyers - except Quetzals and Wyverns - will be grounded if C4 is attached to them.

label: Flyer Speed Leveling
description: Allows flying creatures to have points added to their speed stat.

label: Flyers Rideable
description: Turn on to allow flyers on all maps, turn off to block flyers on all maps. Leave default to let the map decide.

label: Flyers Rideable in Caves
description: Allow flyers to enter caves without dismounting the player.

label: Food Gain Multiplier
description: Number of real world hours required to fully feed a dino.

label: Force All Structure Locking
description: All structures will be locked by default.

label: Force Respawn Creatures
description: Performs a wild dino wipe at server startup.

label: Fuel Consumption Interval Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will consume less fuel. Be aware, less fuel means less charcoal from burning wood.

label: Gachas Unhappy In Caves
description: When turned on, Gachas will be unhappy while in caves, and so will not produce.

label: Global Harvest Health Multiplier
description: Specifies the scaling factor for the "health" of items that can be harvested (trees, rocks, carcasses, etc.). Higher values increase the amount of damage (i.e. "number of strikes") such objects can withstand before being destroyed, which results in higher overall harvest yields.

label: Global Harvest Rate Multiplier
description: Specifies the scaling factor for yields from all harvesting activities (chopping down trees, picking berries, carving carcasses, mining rocks, etc.). Higher values increase the amount of materials harvested with each strike.

label: Global Stack Size Multiplier
description: allow increasing or decreasing global item stack size, this means all default stacksizes will be multiplied by the value given

label: Global Voice Chat
description: Voice chat is broadcast to the entire server.

label: Good Word List URL
description: URL to a text file containing allowed words, one word per line.

label: Hardcore Mode
description: Enables hardcore mode (player characters revert to level 1 upon death)

label: Harvest XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of experience gained from harvesting with tools or by hand.

label: Health Gain Multiplier
description: Number of real world hours required to fully heal a dino.

label: Hexagon Cost Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase the cost of items on the Hex Store.

label: Hexagon Reward Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase the amount of hexagons rewarded to players.

label: Hide Damage Source From Tribe Logs
description: Sources of damage will not be included in the tribe logs.

label: Highlight Point of Death
description: When a player dies, map marker will be placed at the point of their death. Players can see only their own markers.

label: Hit Markers
description: Allows players to enable hit markers.

label: Idle Player Timeout
description: Number of seconds that must pass without input from a player before they are considered idle.

label: Ignore "No Building" Zones
description: Allows building in many locations that are normally restricted. Those locations are map-specific.

label: Imprint Amount Multiplier
description: Adjusts the amount of imprinting each cuddle event provides. For example, if a cuddle would normally provide 10% imprinting, a value of 2.0 would increase that to 20% and a value of 0.5 would decrease that to 5%.

label: Invincible Period
description: Number of seconds players are invincible after connecting.

label: Item Duplication Checking
description: Enables additional duplication protection. May not work with all mods.

label: Item-Specific Harvest Rate Multiplier
description: Used to set harvest rate multipliers for specific items. The global harvest rate multiplier still applies.

label: Item Stack Size
description: Allows changing the stack size of individual resources. One config per item.

label: Kick Idle Players
description: Causes players to be kicked after the idle period elapses.

label: Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of experience gained for kills.

label: King Titan Spawn Time
description: The real-world time of day the King Titan should spawn. This will be in the server's time zone, which is usually UTC. Format as HH:MM:SS.

label: Limit Number of Turrets in Range
description: Limit the number of turrets allowed in a defined range.

label: Limit Only Platformed Tames
description: Tame limits will apply only to rafts and creatures with platform saddles. Regular creatures do not count to the tame limit.

label: Limit Tribe Bunkers
description: Limits the number of bunkers that may belong to a tribe.

label: Log Admin Commands to Chat
description: Logs all admin commands to in-game chat.

label: Log Admin Commands to Files
description: Logs all admin commands to the server log files.

label: Low Memory Mode
description: Reduces graphics and audio effects to save about 800MB of RAM.

label: Mating Interval Reduction
description: Number of real world hours to subtract from mating cooldown.

label: Max Alliances Per Tribe
description: The maximum number of alliances the tribe can join.

label: Max Gates on Platform Saddles
description: The maximum number of gate frames that can be placed on a platform saddle.

label: Max Hexagons
description: The maximum number of Hexagons a player can have in their wallet at any time.

label: Maximum Active Outposts
description: Maximum number of NPC outpots on the map.

label: Maximum Bunkers Per Tribe
description: The maximum number of bunkers that can belong to a tribe.

label: Maximum Generators In Range
description: The maximum number of generators within a range defined by the "Range of Generators Limit" setting.

label: Maximum Outposts In The City
description: Maximum number of NPC outposts inside the city.

label: Maximum Resource Caches
description: Maximum number of NPC resource caches on the map.

label: Max Number of Dropped Items
description: The maximum number of dropped items allowed within a defined range.

label: Max Number of Players in Tribe
description: The maximum number of players allowed in each tribe.

label: Max Platform Saddle Structure Limit
description: Changes the maximum number of platformed-creatures/rafts allowed on the ARK (a potential performance cost)

label: Max Players
description: Specifies the maximum number of players that can play on the server simultaneously. Hosts almost always override this setting.

label: Max Players Per Tribe
description: Maximum number of players in a tribe.

label: Max Safe Fall Distance Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of time a player can fall before taking fall damage.

label: Max Structures in Range
description: Specifies the maximum number of structures that can be constructed within a hard-coded radius.

label: Max Tames (Hard Limit)
description: Sets the maximum number of tamed creatures on a server.

label: Max Tames (Soft Limit)
description: The maximum number of tames allowed on the server before triggering the destroy countdown.

label: Max Tribe Logs
description: Maximum number of tribe log lines to keep.

label: Max Tribes Per Alliance
description: The maximum number of tribes that can belong to an alliance. All alliances, by definition, have at least 2 tribes.

label: Max Tribe Tames
description: Activates a per-tribe tamed creature limit. Official servers use 250.

label: Max Turrets in Range
description: The number of turrets allowed within the limit range.

label: Max Uploaded Creatures
description: The maximum number of creatures that can be uploaded to an obelisk.

label: Max Uploaded Items
description: The maximum number of items that can be uploaded to an obelisk.

label: Message of the Day
description: The message shown to players as they join the server.
default_value: Don't let the dinosaurs eat you.

label: Message of the Day Duration
description: How long the message of the day should be shown to players as they join the server.

label: Minimum Creature Reupload Interval
description: Number of seconds that must pass between downloading a creature and uploading it again.

label: Minimum Distance Between Bunkers
description: Minimum distance between bunkers in centimeters. 1 foundation is 300cm wide.

label: Minimum Players to Quick Start
description: Number of players required to start the quick timer.

label: Minimum Tribes to Start
description: Number of tribes required to start the normal timer.

label: Multi-Floor Platform Saddles
description: Allows multiple floors on platform saddles.

label: Multiple Attached C4
description: Allows attaching more than one C4 to a creature.

label: Multiply World Buffs
description: World buffs are applied using multiplication instead of addition or subtraction.

label: New Year First Drop Time
description: The first time of the New Year's present drop as a unix epoch timestamp. Default time is Jan 1st 2023 at 12:00 AM PST.

label: New Year Second Drop Time
description: The second time of the New Year's present drop.

label: Night Time Speed Scale
description: Adjust the amount of night. Values above 1.0 increase the length of night.

label: No Ally Dino Collision
description: Allows players to walk through ally dinos.

label: No Anti-Mesh Kill Protection
description: Stops the anti-meshing protection from teleporting a player who kills another.

label: No Anti-Mesh Protection
description: Turns off the anti-meshing protection.

label: No BattlEye
description: Run the server without BattlEye.

label: No Bosses
description: Disables bosses.

label: No Building in Genesis Mission Areas
description: Prevents players from building in areas of the map reserved for missions.

label: No Building in Resource Rich Areas
description: Completely disables building inside resource rich areas, such as the major mountains on The Island.

label: No Buying From Hex Store
description: Allows only selling engrams on the Hex Store.

label: No Creature Downloads
description: Prevents players from downloading creatures from the cluster onto the server.

label: No Creature Riding
description: Players cannot ride any creatures.

label: No Creature Spawning
description: Prevents dinos from spawning. Admins will still need to perform a dino wipe.

label: No Creature Taming
description: Creatures cannot be tamed.

label: No Creature Uploads
description: Prevents players from uploading creatures to the cluster.

label: No Default Spawn Items
description: Players will not spawn with default items, such as the Federation Tek Suit on Genesis Part 2.

label: No Dino Supply Crates
description: Disables the dino crate system.

label: No Diseases
description: Completely disables diseases.

label: No Downloads
description: Disables all downloading from other servers, including cluster servers. Player characters will be lost during transfer into the server.

label: No Fishing Loot
description: Disables non-meat fishing loot.

label: No Friendly Fire in PvE
description: Players and tames of the same tribe cannot hurt each other when the server is in PvE mode.

label: No Friendly Fire in PvP
description: Players and tames of the same tribe cannot hurt each other when the server is in PvP mode.

label: No Genesis Missions
description: Turns off missions on Genesis.

label: No Hexagon Store
description: Turns off the Hexagon store.

label: No HUD
description: Player HUD / on-screen info is always hidden.

label: No Item Downloads
description: Prevents players from downloading items from the cluster onto the server.

label: No Item Uploads
description: Prevents players from uploading items to the cluster.

label: No Loot Crates
description: Turns off loot drops and crates.

label: No Mate Boost
description: Creatures are no longer buffed by having members of the opposite sex nearby.

label: Non-Native Creatures on Aberration
description: Allows players to tribute download non-native creatures on the Aberration map.

label: Non Permanent Diseases
description: Diseases will be cleared when the player respawns.

label: No ORP Creature Decay
description: When enabled, creatures will not decay while protected by Offline Raid Protection.

label: No ORP Structure Decay
description: When enabled, structures will not decay while protected by Offline Raid Protection.

label: No Player Downloads
description: Prevents players from downloading their survivor from the cluster onto the server.

label: No Player Movement Optimizations
description: Disables the player movement physics optimization.

label: No Player Uploads
description: Prevents players from transferring out of the server.

label: No Ridden Dino Collision
description: Allows ridden dinos to phase through corpses, unconscious dinos, and ally dinos.

label: No Simple Structure Range Limit
description: Removes the limit of simple structures like cables, taxidermy bases, canvases, incubators, and cliff platforms.

label: No Sky Effects
description: Most sky features are disabled, such as clouds and stars.

label: No Sleeping Dino Collision
description: Allows players to walk through unconscious dinos.

label: No Spawn Animations
description: Disables the wake up animation when spawning.

label: No Spectators
description: Disables spectators.

label: No Speed Hack Detection
description: Disables speed hack detection.

label: No Structure Collision
description: Structures will be allowed to intersect the terrain.

label: No Tribe Alliances
description: Completely disables tribe alliances.

label: No Tribes
description: Disables tribes, forcing free-for-all.

label: No Wild Babies
description: When turned on, wild babies will not spawn.

label: No World Buffs
description: Completely disables world effects from missions in Genesis Part 2.

label: Offline Raid Protection
description: Turns on the offline raiding protection features.

label: Only Auto Destroy Core Structures
description: Only foundations and pillars will be auto destroyed.

label: Only Decay Unsnapped Core Structures
description: Only foundations and pillars that are not snapped to others will be decayed. Useful to reduce the impact of pillar spam.

label: Passive Repair Multiplier
description: Passive repair speed of Necrocene items. Values greater than 0.1 will repair faster.

label: Passive Tame Interval Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of time between passive tame events.

label: Passive XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase the amount of experience players and tamed creatures will passively gain.

label: Percent of Event Colored Dinos
description: Percentage of dino spawns to be event-colored. Value between 0=none and 1=all.

label: Per Platform Max Structures Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the number of structures allowed on platforms and rafts.

label: Photo Mode Range
description: The range, in centimeters, that the photo mode camera can move. A foundation is 300cm wide.

label: Platform Saddle Build Area Bounds Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the range structures can be built away from platform saddles.

label: Platform Saddle Slot Cost
description: The number of slots a platform saddle costs against the tribe tame limit.

label: Player Damage Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase damage dealt by players.

label: Player Food Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate players lose food.

label: Player Health Recovery Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate players heal.

label: Player Join Messages
description: Players will always get notified if someone joins the server

label: Player Leave Messages
description: Players will always get notified if someone leaves the server

label: Player Resistance Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase damage taken by players. At 0.0, players are invincible.

label: Player Resource Blocking Radius Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase the range that resources will not respawn around players.

label: Player Stamina Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate players lose stamina.

label: Player Water Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate players lose water.

label: Poop Interval Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of time that must past for the player to poop again. Do not set to 0.

label: Prevent Creature Transfer Classes
description: Creature class strings that should not be allowed to be transferred between servers.

label: Prevent Hibernation
description: Prevents freezing areas of the map without players in single player and non-dedicated servers.

label: Proximity Chat Only
description: Only players near each other can see their chat messages

label: Public Landing on Quetz Platform Saddles
description: Allows non-allied creatures to park on Quetzal platform saddles while flying.

label: PvE Mode
description: Disables PvP, enables PvE

label: PvE Structure Decay Destruction Period
description: Specifies the time required for player structures to decay in PvE mode. The specific effect(s) of this option and its range of valid values are unknown as of this writing.[1]

label: PvE Structure Decay Period Multiplier
description: Specifies the scaling factor for the decay rate of player structures in PvE mode. The specific effect(s) of this option and its range of valid values are unknown as of this writing.[1]

label: PvP Gamma Changes
description: Allow use of console command "gamma" in PvP mode

label: Raid Dino Food Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate raid dinos such as Titanosaur and Titans lose food.

label: Random Supply Crate Locations
description: Supply drops will spawn in random locations. This setting is known to cause artifacts becoming inaccessible on Ragnarok.

label: Range of Generators Limit
description: The radius, in centimeters, that cannot have more generators than defined by the "Maximum Generators In Range" setting. One foundation is 300cm wide.

label: Range of Turret Limit
description: The range of turret limits in UE4 units. One foundation is 300x300 units.

label: Range to Limit Dropped Items
description: The range to limit and count dropped items, in UE4 units. One foundation is 300x300 units.

label: Resource Respawn Period Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of time it takes for resources, such as rocks and trees, to respawn.

label: Respawn Cooldown Time
description: Amount of respawn cooldown, in seconds, to add on the first death.

label: Respawn Cooldown Time Multiplier
description: Amount the respawn cooldown scales with each death. Values greater than 1 increase the cooldown.

label: Respawn Creatures Interval
description: Number of seconds between automated creature wipes without restarting the server. Timer resets at server startup.

label: Respawn Reset Time
description: Amount of time, in seconds, that must pass without death to reset the respawn cooldown.

label: Sacrifice Cost Multiplier
description: Repair cost multiplier. Values higher than 1 mean repairs are more expensive than normal.

label: Sacrifice Durability Bonus
description: Additional durability percent after using the bloodforge. For example, 100 durability would repair to 130 at 0.3x.

label: Secure Send Ark Payload
description: Defends against creature upload exploit.

label: Server Name
description: The name of the server in the server browser.
default_value: This is an unofficial Ark server

label: Server Password
description: If specified, players must provide this password to join the server.

label: Show Floating Damage Text
description: Turn on to enable damage numbers to appear on attacks by players.

label: Show Integrated S+ Structures
description: Show the S+ structures built into the game. It is recommended to leave this turned on unless the server is running the Structures Plus or Super Structures mods.

label: Show Player Location on Map
description: Show each player their own position when they view their map.

label: Show Structure Destruction in Tribe Logs
description: Structure destruction will be logged to the tribe logs.

label: Soft Tame Limit Grace Period
description: Number of seconds until tames over the soft limit are destroyed.

label: SotF Gameplay Logging
description: Saves a dated gameplay log file to the Saved directory for Survival of the Fittest servers.

label: Special XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from opening explorer notes.

label: Spectator Password
description: To use non-admin spectator, the server must specify a spectator password. Then any client can use these console commands: requestspectator <password> and stopspectating. See patch 191.0 for more information and hotkeys.

label: Spike Walls Damage All Creatures
description: Spike walls will damage wild and tamed creatures that do not have riders.

label: Stamina Recovers While Flying
description: Quetzals will regenerate stamina while flying if they are not mounted.

label: Stasis Range Multiplier
description: Maximum multiplier applied to stasis range based on player counts. Official servers use 0.5.

label: Stasis Range Scaling Max Player Count
description: Stasis range will be fully changed once this many players have joined the server. Official servers use 70.

label: Stasis Range Scaling Min Player Count
description: Stasis range will begin to change once this many players have joined the server. Official servers use 24.

label: Structure Damage Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the damage that passive defenses, like spikes, do to victims.

label: Structure Damage Repair Cooldown
description: Number of seconds that must pass before a structure may be repaired.

label: Structure Memory Optimization
description: Enables structure memory optimization. This can break structure snap points for mod structures that have not been updated.

label: Structure Pickup Hold Duration
description: Number of seconds the player must hold over the pickup option before the pickup will be complete.

label: Structure Pickup Time After Placement
description: Number of seconds a structure can be picked up after being placed.

label: Structure Resistance Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase damage taken by structures. At 0.0, structures are invincible.

label: Structure Resource Blocking Radius Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase the range that resources will not respawn around structures.

label: Structures at Supply Drops in PvE
description: Structures can be built at supply drop locations.

label: Supply Crate Loot Quality Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 improve the quality of items in loot drops.

label: Swim Speed Multiplier
description: Values greater than 5.0 increase the amount the oxygen stat affects swim speed.

label: Tamed Creature Food Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate tamed creatures lose food.

label: Tamed Creature Torpor Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate tamed creatures lose torpor, making them easier to wake up or keep awake.

label: Tamed Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from killing other tribe tames.

label: Taming Speed Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the amount of taming completed by each taming event, such as passive feeding or a knocked-out bite.

label: Tek Suit Powers on Genesis
description: Allows Tek suit powers in Genesis Part 1

label: Third Person Camera
description: Allows players to switch into third person view.

label: Time to Quick Start
description: Quick time to auto start the match, in seconds.

label: Time to Start
description: Normal time to auto start the match, in seconds.

label: Titanosaur Feeding
description: Allows feeding of Titanosaurs.

label: Torpor Drain Multiplier
description: Number of real world hours to empty the torpor of a dino.

label: Tribe Name Change Cooldown
description: Number of minutes that must pass before a tribe name may be changed.

label: Tribe Slot Reuse Cooldown
description: Number of seconds that must pass before a tribe slot may be filled again.

label: Tribe Wars
description: In PvE mode, allows tribes to declare war on each other for a mutually agreed upon amount of time. In PvP mode, tribes are always at war.

label: Tribe Wars Can Be Cancelled
description: PvE tribe wars may be cancelled before they start.

label: Turn Off Turrets Over Limit
description: If the turret limit is enabled, random turrets over the limit will be shut off.

label: Turret Creature Damage Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase damage from turrets against creatures.

label: Turrets on Platform Saddles
description: Enables building turrets and spikes on platform saddles.

label: Unclaimed Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from killing unclaimed creatures.

label: Unlimited Respecs
description: Turns off the 24 hour cooldown on Mindwipe Tonics.

label: Unlock Bunker Damage Threshold
description: After a bunker has only this amount of health remaining, it becomes unlocked to enemies.

label: Unlocked Bunker Damage Multiplier
description: After a bunker is forced open by an enemy, incoming damage is multiplied by this value.

label: Uploaded Character Expiration
description: Number of seconds before uploaded survivors expire.

label: Uploaded Creature Expiration
description: Number of seconds before uploaded dinos expire.

label: Uploaded Item Expiration
description: Number of seconds before uploaded items expire.

label: Use Auto PvE Timer
description: When turned on, the server switches between PvE and PvP at specific times.

label: Use Dynamic Config
description: Enables the use of a dynamic config file, supplied by CustomDynamicConfigURL. If a file is not provided, the default for the platform will be used.

label: Use Optimized Harvesting Rates
description: When enabled, server lag is reduced by sending a single harvest event to the server for each swing of a tool, and the results are multiplied by the global harvest rate. Otherwise, the server will send one harvest event per global rate multiplier for each swing of a tool. This produces more "rare" resources, but can add significant lag to the server.

label: Use Respawn Cooldown in PvP Mode
description: Players will have a respawn cooldown if the server is in PvP mode.

label: Use Single Player Settings
description: Adjusts baseline multipliers to be more substantial when playing alone.

label: Use System Time for Auto PvE
description: When turned on, the times are real world times instead of in-game times.

label: Use Unified Save Data
description: When turned on, player and tribe files will be stored inside the map save data instead of separate files.

label: Web Alarms
description: Turns on web alerts.

label: Wild Creature Food Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate wild creatures lose food.

label: Wild Creature Torpor Drain Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the rate wild creatures lose torpor, making them easier to wake up or keep awake.

label: Wild Kill XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from killing wild creatures.

label: World Buff Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 will increase the effects of world buffs.

label: XP Multiplier
description: Values greater than 1.0 increase the experience gained from all sources.

label: Access Key
description: Identifies the server to Beacon Sentinel.
